skills.name: favcrm-agentic-registration
skills.description: Use when a new user wants to register for FavCRM from inside an MCP client, create a FavCRM workspace, request or verify signup OTP, receive a fav_mcp_* API key, or continue setup after agentic registration.

skills.name: favcrm-booking-operator
skills.description: Use for service setup, availability, booking lifecycle, cancellations, no-shows, reminders, and daily booking operations in FavCRM.

skills.name: favcrm-team-onboarding
skills.description: Use when inviting teammates, accepting team invite tokens, verifying invite OTPs, and issuing invited-user MCP API keys.

skills.name: favcrm-channel-setup
skills.description: Use when checking or connecting communication channels, especially WhatsApp Business Embedded Signup.

skills.name: favcrm-customer-lifecycle
skills.description: Use for customer search, member profiles, tags, tiers, loyalty, segments, onboarding, retention, and customer 360 summaries in FavCRM.

skills.name: favcrm-comms-approval
skills.description: Use for FavCRM marketing campaigns, customer reactivation, broadcasts, WhatsApp, SMS, email, inbox replies, and approval-gated customer communications.

skills.name: favcrm-billing-commerce
skills.description: Use for invoices, payments, products, orders, promotions, subscriptions, overdue follow-up, and commerce operations in FavCRM.

skills.name: favcrm-content-publisher
skills.description: Use for FavCRM blog posts, CMS content blocks, landing-page content, AI-generated images, post publishing, post updates, and content workflows.

skills.name: favcrm-sales-ops
skills.description: Use for FavCRM deals, pipeline stages, internal tasks, follow-ups, owners, workspace switching, and operational handoffs.

skills.name: favcrm-knowledge-training
skills.description: Use for training the FavCRM AI agent with URLs or pasted text, listing knowledge documents, checking ingestion status, and pruning outdated knowledge.

skills.name: favcrm-business-reporting
skills.description: Use for FavCRM dashboards, weekly snapshots, KPI summaries, revenue, bookings, invoices, subscriptions, customer growth, and operational risk reports.
